---
title: People
listing:
    - id: pi
      contents: "pi/*.qmd"
      type: grid
      image-height: 225px
      grid-columns: 3
      sort: sortby
      fields: [image, title, position]
      field-display-names:
          position: " "
      grid-item-align: left

    - id: grad-students
      contents: "grad-students/*.qmd"
      type: grid
      image-height: 225px
      grid-columns: 3
      sort: sortby
      fields: [image, title, position]
      field-display-names:
          position: " "
      grid-item-align: left

    - id: grad-students-coadvised
      contents: "grad-students-coadvised/*.qmd"
      type: grid
      image-height: 225px
      grid-columns: 3
      sort: sortby
      fields: [image, title, position]
      field-display-names:
          position: " "
      grid-item-align: left

    # - id: undergrads
    #   contents: "undergrad-students/*.qmd"
    #   type: grid
    #   image-height: 225px
    #   grid-columns: 3
    #   sort: sortby
    #   fields: [image, title, position]
    #   grid-item-align: left

    - id: alumni
      contents: "alumni/*.qmd"
      type: table
      sort: [ended desc, sortby]
      fields: [title, position, started, ended]
      field-display-names:
          title: "Name"
          position: "Role"
          started: "Started"
          ended: "Ended"
---

::: {#pi}
:::

::: {#grad-students}
:::

::: {#grad-students-coadvised}
:::

## Alumni

::: {#alumni}
:::
